characters.name: Baby Bugs
characters.description: Baby Bugsis the main character inBaby Looney Tunesand the baby version of Bugs Bunny. He was voiced bySamuel Vincent, who also voicedBaby DaffyandBaby Tweety. Baby Bugs is a three-year-old gray rabbit with a fluffy tail, and white paws, muzzle, and chest. He has pale pink inner ears and a pink nose. He wore white gloves like his adult counterpart and a diaper in the episodes "Taz in Toyland" through "Taz You Like It". Baby Bugs is the leader of the group due to his older age and maturity. While normally friendly and fair, he can be bossy sometimes and cause conflict withBaby Lolaor Baby Daffy, both of whom are also strong-minded and show leadership qualities. Though generally quite confident, Bugs has anxious tendencies and will sometimes panic if he cannot achieve something properly on the first try. In this way, he relies on his friends to show him through.

characters.name: Baby Daffy
characters.description: Baby Daffyis a main character inBaby Looney Tunesand the baby version of Daffy Duck. He was voiced bySamuel Vincent, who also voicedBaby BugsandBaby Tweety. Baby Daffy is a three-year-old black duckling with an orange beak and legs. He wore a diaper in "Taz in Toyland" through "Taz You Like It", like the other babies. Baby Daffy often wants the approval of others, but he is selfish and self-indulgent, so he often ends up scheming to get something from others or to make things easier for himself. Sometimes, he can be downright greedy, but at other times, his childish nature shows that he doesn't really mean to be. Daffy has a foul temper and often butts heads with the others over disagreements.

characters.name: Baby K-9
characters.description: Baby K-9is a character inBaby Looney Tunes. He is the pet ofBaby Marvinand the puppy version of K-9. Like the adult and toddler versions of Marvin the Martian, the adult and puppy versions of K-9 share many similarities.  Baby K-9 is a green-colored puppy with dark green ears and a red nose. Like Baby Marvin, he wears a skirt and tennis shoes.  However, they sport propellers on their helmets rather than their adult counterparts' push-brooms.

characters.name: Baby Lola
characters.description: Baby Lolais a main character inBaby Looney Tunes. She was voiced byBritt McKillip, the only child actor in the cast. Baby Lola is a three-year-old bunny who resembles Baby Bugs in that they are both rabbits with long ears, white muzzles, toes, chest, a pink nose, and pink inner-ears. Baby Lola has orange-tan fur, and her tail was the same color in the first season, and white in the second. She has light blue eyes and blonde hair with a tuft of bangs reaching her eyes. She wears a purple bow on her ears. Like the other babies, exceptBaby TweetyandBaby Taz, she wore a diaper until several episodes later.  Lola wears gloves with frilly cuff.

characters.name: Baby Marvin
characters.description: Baby Marvinis a minor character inBaby Looney Tunes.  He was voiced bySamuel Vincent. Baby Marvin is a human-like alien from Mars and the toddler version of Marvin the Martian.  He debuted in "War of the Weirds" as a visitor to Granny's house. He shares many similarities with his adult counterpart; he has a black spherical head with only two eyes on it and wears a green helmet and skirt, a red suit, white gloves, and tennis shoes.  Both Baby Marvin and his adult counterpart are generally quiet and clever. They are also fond of using telescopes and doing experiments.

characters.name: Baby Melissa
characters.description: Baby Melissais a recurring character inBaby Looney Tunes. Baby Melissa is a female yellow duckling with an orange bill, legs, and feet.  She is the baby version of Melissa Duck. She has green eyes and an orange ponytail, which is held up by a green bow. Baby Melissa is a highly-ambitious, strong-willed, and thoughtful sort with a good nature. At times, she can be stubborn, controlling, and hot-tempered. She would argue to get her way. Like Daffy, she can pull off a good prank. Sometimes, she can be prone to telling rumors if it benefits her.

characters.name: Baby Pepe
characters.description: Baby Pepeis a minor character inBaby Looney Tunes. He was voiced byTerry Klassen. Baby Pepe is a black and white skunk with a big black nose and eyes and a tuft of white hair that sticks up on top of his head. Sometimes he wears a pale blue diaper.  He is the baby version of Pepe Le Pew. Pepe debuted as an infant in "New Cat in Town", where he saysBaby Sylvester's name as his first word. In "Stop and Smell Up the Flowers", Baby Pepe gives a tour around the Acme gardens.

characters.name: Baby Petunia
characters.description: Baby Petuniais a character inBaby Looney Tunes. Baby Petunia is the three-year-old baby version of Petunia Pig.  She is a pink pig with brown pigtails, later black, held with orange bows, later red, and matching brown hooves and eyes.  She wore a diaper at first, but by the time the other babies stopped wearing them, she wore frilly pale yellow training panties with a white bow on the front. Baby Petunia is gentle and a bit quiet.  At first, she usually would just agree withBaby Melissaabout everything, either for the sake of having no other idea or to gain her approval.  Not too long after, Baby Petunia started to branch out a little, showing a nurturing and kind side.  Sometimes, she is concerned over being left out or unheard, but she has learned how to handle such situations.  She is also mature with some subjects, and due to this, gets along very well with the equally gentleBaby Tweety. She is normally with Baby Melissa, usually to play tea party.

characters.name: Baby Sylvester
characters.description: Baby Sylvesteris a character inBaby Looney Tunes.  He was voiced byTerry Klassen. Baby Sylvester is a three-year-old black-and-white tuxedo cat. He has a big red nose. He wore a diaper in "Taz in Toyland" through "Taz You Like It", like the other babies. InLooney Tunesin the 1940s, he was known for chasing Tweety and Speedy Gonzales. In this show, he is good friends with Baby Tweety. At times, he is shy and hesitant, and he makes an easy target forBaby Daffyto hoax and trade with, although Sylvester has hoaxed and tricked Daffy as well. He likes to get attention fromGrannymore than the others. Despite his frequent shyness, he does have a brave side; in "A Mid-Autumn Night's Scream", he's the only one brave enough to trick-or-treat at Hillside Manor. He also wears a musketeer outfit. Baby Sylvester is afraid of lightning and water, and he hates pickles.

characters.name: Baby Taz
characters.description: Baby Tazis a main character inBaby Looney Tunes. Baby Taz is a two-year-old Tasmanian devil and the baby version of Taz. Baby Taz looks the same as his adult counterpart: he has brown fur throughout his body but paler on his muzzle, and has a big mouth. However, he only has one visible tooth.

characters.name: Baby Tweety
characters.description:
Baby Tweetyis a character inBaby Looney Tunes.  He was voiced bySamuel Vincent. Baby Tweety is a one-year-old male yellow canary and the baby version of Tweety. He is the youngest of the babies.  
He looks very similar to his adult self, but his feet are smaller. Baby Tweety is the brainstormer when the others are out of ideas. Baby Tweety will often translate whatBaby Tazis saying.  He is depicted as the logical thinker, because he comes up with ideas when the others are unable to.  He is very insecure about his small build, which he must overcome in most episodes centered around him.
